Completed Carpentry Projects

Real projects with materials, process details, and before/after notes.

Project: White Oak Built-Ins in Cleveland TN

Custom living room built-ins with concealed media storage and display shelving tailored to asymmetrical wall dimensions.

Project: Floating Shelves and Niche Storage in Athens TN

Kitchen and breakfast nook floating shelves designed for daily-use storage with a lighter visual footprint.

Project: Custom Mantel Installation in Chattanooga TN

Fireplace mantel installation with hidden steel support and proportion-matched detailing for a remodeled great room.

Project: Dining Room Wainscoting in Collegedale TN

Custom wall panel system designed to improve durability and visual structure in a high-traffic dining room.

Project: Multi-Room Crown Molding in Ringgold GA

Whole-home crown molding package to unify ceiling transitions across living spaces and hallways.

Project: Geometric Accent Wall in Dalton GA

Custom geometric trim feature wall for a primary bedroom with precise layout and paint-ready detailing.

Plan Your Carpentry Project
